channel.title: The System Design Newsletter
channel.description: Download my system design playbook on newsletter signup for FREE

item.title: 【The 53 Concepts for Highly Effective Mobile System Design】高效移动系统设计的 53 个概念

item.title: 【I struggled with AI agents until I built an incident response agent 】我一直在与人工智能代理作斗争，直到我构建了一个事件响应代理

item.title: 【21 Reinforcement Learning (RL) Concepts Explained Simply】21 个强化学习 (RL) 概念简单解释

item.title: 【I struggled with system design until I learned these 114 concepts】我在系统设计上很挣扎，直到我学会了这 114 个概念

item.title: 【Context Engineering vs Prompt Engineering】情境工程与即时工程
